summary: Senior infrastructure project manager with 16 years of experience delivering large-scale transport and civil engineering projects across the GCC region. Currently serving as Programme Manager at WSP overseeing a USD 800M highway expansion project in Saudi Arabia. Previously delivered a USD 350M interchange project in Abu Dhabi. Chartered Civil Engineer (ICE) with PMP certification and deep expertise in NEC3/NEC4 contracts, FIDIC Red Book, Primavera P6 scheduling, and GCC regulatory compliance.

experience.title: Programme Manager — Highways
bullets: Directed programme delivery for USD 800M highway expansion in Jeddah comprising 42km dual carriageway with 6 interchanges
Managed integrated multi-disciplinary team of 35 engineers spanning design review, construction supervision, and contract administration
Administered NEC3 Engineering and Construction Contracts across 4 main contractors, ensuring compliance with contractual obligations
Maintained master programme schedule in Primavera P6 with over 8,000 activities, achieving 94% schedule adherence
Oversaw risk register with 200+ active risks and conducted monthly quantitative schedule risk analysis (QSRA)

experience.title: Senior Project Manager — Infrastructure
bullets: Delivered USD 350M Musaffah interchange and road network upgrade for Abu Dhabi Department of Transport
Coordinated with Abu Dhabi Municipality (ADM) and Estidama team to achieve Pearl 1 sustainability rating
Led multi-disciplinary team of 22 professionals (civil, structural, MEP, landscape) through detailed design and construction phases
Administered FIDIC Red Book contracts covering 3 construction packages
Successfully resolved USD 28M in contractor claims through structured negotiation and Dispute Adjudication Board (DAB) referrals

experience.title: Project Engineer (promoted from Graduate Engineer, 2011)
bullets: Progressed from graduate engineer to project engineer on UK highways and rail infrastructure projects
Supported delivery of A14 Cambridge to Huntingdon improvement scheme (GBP 1.5B)
Developed proficiency in Primavera P6 and earned PMP certification (2013)

certifications: Chartered Civil Engineer (CEng MICE) — Institution of Civil Engineers
